summary: Full frontend testing of Sonja's 16th birthday neon luxury redesign. All major features verified and working. One minor SVG rendering bug found with Framer Motion on SVG circle elements.

ui_bugs.issue: 6 browser console errors: '<circle> attribute r: Expected length, "undefined"'. Caused by Framer Motion animating `scale` on SVG <circle> elements (line 79 HeroSection.jsx) - SVG elements don't support CSS scale transforms like HTML. City names still display as text labels, but the core dot circles may flicker or render as zero-size briefly.
ui_bugs.fix_suggestion: Replace animate={{ scale: 1, opacity: 1 }} with animate={{ r: 4, opacity: 1 }} and initial={{ r: 0, opacity: 0 }} for SVG circle elements

issues: World map area appears empty/dark on mobile - city node circles may not be visible due to SVG scale animation bug

action_items: Fix SVG circle scale animation in HeroSection.jsx line 79: change initial={{ scale: 0, opacity: 0 }} animate={{ scale: 1, opacity: 1 }} to initial={{ r: 0, opacity: 0 }} animate={{ r: 4, opacity: 1 }} for proper SVG attribute animation
critical_code_review_comments: HeroSection.jsx:79 - motion.circle uses animate={{ scale }} which is CSS transform - not valid for SVG r attribute. Use animate={{ r }} instead.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Neon luxury redesign. All sections pass. Minor SVG circle r=undefined bug in WorldMap (HeroSection.jsx line 79). Fix: use animate={{ r: 4 }} not animate={{ scale: 1 }} on SVG circles.
